name: Lumina Gold Corp.
description: Lumina Gold Corp. was a gold-copper developer focused on the Cangrejos Gold-Copper Project in El Oro Province, Ecuador, with over 21 million ounces of gold and 2.7 billion pounds of copper in mineral resources. The company was acquired by CMOC in June 2025, with the project backed by a US$300 million precious metals purchase agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals.
